name: Giant Weasel

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

text:
# Giant Weasel

*Medium Beast, Unaligned*

### Actions

**Bite.** Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage.
